channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Tether, the World’s Biggest Stablecoin, Is Finally Getting Its First Full Audit
item.description: After more than a decade of accusations, the company claims it will submit to a legitimate review of its finances.

item.title: This tax-themed malvertising attack can blind security software before it arrives — and then unleashes ransomware
item.description: If you're rushing to file your taxes, be extra careful - crooks are betting on your sloppiness.

item.title: Good luck, Americans, your Wi-Fi choices are about to get worse — we’ve tested hundreds of routers and every single one of our favorites is made outside of the US
item.description: Judging by our best routers guide, if the FCC does ban non-US-made devices, Americans could be in for a rough ride.

item.title: What You Need to Know About the Foreign-Made Router Ban in the US
item.description: The FCC just banned the sale of new consumer-grade Wi-Fi routers manufactured outside the US. Here’s what it means for you.

item.title: The Moon Has Far Less Water Than Previously Thought, Study Suggests
item.description: A recent search for water ice has turned up empty, casting doubt on the abundance of the valuable resource on the lunar surface.

item.title: Samsung reveals its cheaper mini-LED TVs for 2026 — and it’s dropping QLED on some of them, I kid you not
item.description: New Neo QLED TVs, and two more affordable mini-LED models with no quantum dots mentioned

item.title: OpenAI adds open source tools to help developers build for teen safety
item.description: Rather than working from scratch to figure out how to make AI safer for teens, developers can use these policies to fortify what they build.

item.title: Talat’s AI meeting notes stay on your machine, not in the cloud
item.description: The subscription-free AI meeting notes app is a local-first twist on notetaking tools like Granola.

item.title: The Lego Game Boy makes for a great gift, and it’s $10 off today
item.description: Deals on the Lego Game Boy are virtually nonexistent, save for the $10 discount that Costco and Sam’s Club offered their members when the set launched late last year. The deal is back — this time, at Kohl’s — and no membership is required to get $10 off. You can purchase the Lego Game Boy and have […]

item.title: The Next ‘Gundam’ Movie Is Finally Coming Stateside
item.description: 'Mobile Suit Gundam Hathaway: The Sorcery of Nymph Circe' has been out in Japan since the start of the year, but U.S. audiences will finally get to see it May 15.

item.title: Figure AI Founder and iPhone Air Designer Team Up on Mystery AI Product
item.description: A new company called Hark is building an ambitious-sounding AI lab, with a physical product of some sort in the works.

item.title: Cyberattaque contre le Crous : les données de 774 000 étudiants ont été siphonnées
item.description: Les données de 774 000 étudiants et ex-étudiants ont été siphonnées par des cybercriminels. Le Cnous révèle qu'une cyberattaque s'est soldée par le vol des informations détenues par les services sociaux des Crous.

item.title: Peter Thiel’s Cowgorithm-Powered Cattle Collar Company Raises $220 Million
item.description: Moo-ve over, human tracking. We're doing cows.

item.title: J’ai installé SteamOS sur ma ROG Xbox Ally : pourquoi je ne reviendrai plus en arrière
item.description: Avec SteamOS 3.8, Valve commence à supporter officiellement la Xbox Ally. J'ai voulu profiter de cette version pour franchir le cap et tester le système d'exploitation de Valve sur ma machine. Voici pourquoi je ne reviendrai plus en arrière.

item.title: Three new Gemini features come to Google TV
item.description: Google has announced a trio of new AI-powered features for its Google TV platform, after showing off smarter Gemini integration at CES back in January. Google TV can now provide "richer visual help" when you ask it a question. Request the current sports scores, for example, and Gemini will bring up not only a live updating scorecard, but also where you can watch the game. If you’re looking for a recipe, it’ll pair its results with a video tutorial where possible. If you’d rather learn something new than binge away at your latest Netflix fix, Google TV can also now do visual "deep dives" on top...

item.title: Honor 400, Nakamura Crossover LTD et forfaits gratuits jusqu’à l’été : les 3 bons plans incontournables du mardi 24 mars 2026
item.description: En ce mardi 24 mars 2026, plusieurs offres méritent toute votre attention si vous cherchez à économiser sur des produits technologiques et mobilité.

item.title: Apple confirms ads are coming to Apple Maps
item.description: Apple Maps will soon have ads, Apple confirmed in a blog post announcing the company's new Apple Business platform. Reports that Apple planned to expand its ad business outside of the App Store and Apple News broke as recently as yesterday, but the company has been rumored to be exploring putting ads in its navigation app as far back as 2022.Ads in Maps, as the new advertising program is called, will allow businesses to create ads that can appear "when users search in Maps," at the top of search results and "at the top of a new Suggested Places experience in Maps, which will display recommenda...

item.title: BKR Capital raises $14.5M (so far) to invest in Black founders
item.description: BKR Capital announced Monday that its Fund II closed $20 million Canadian toward its $50 million target.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 : on sait déjà à quoi il va ressembler
item.description: Le design du Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 se montre déjà grâce à des rendus publiés par OnLeaks. Une question se pose déjà sur la finesse du smartphone.

item.title: Our Favorite Turntable Is $51 Off Before Record Store Day
item.description: Audio-Technica is a leading name in home and professional audio, and the AT-LP120XUSB is a great turntable for most listeners.

item.title: OpenAIs new open-source prompts take aim at sexual content for teens
item.description: ChatGPT parent company OpenAI launches new developer-level policies to ensure teen protections across model ecosystem.

item.title: Who Was the Worst Targaryen to Rule Westeros?
item.description: Unsurprisingly, there are a lot of candidates among the House of the Dragon.

item.title: For All Mankind is returning for a sixth and final season
item.description: Apple TV's long-running sci-fi show For All Mankind has just been renewed for a sixth and final season, ahead of this week's season five premiere. This seems more like the natural endpoint of the story instead of a cancellation, according to remarks made by some of the creators. "Getting to explore the For All Mankind universe over six seasons has been an amazing privilege, and we’re thrilled to have the opportunity to finish the story the way we’ve always hoped," co-creators and showrunners Matt Wolpert and Ben Nedivi said. "We’re incredibly proud of what this series has become, and grateful ...

item.title: État, entretien, localisation : comment Bosch va rendre beaucoup plus simple la gestion des vélos électriques pour les professionnels
item.description: En partageant ses données et des fonctionnalités supplémentaires, la plateforme Bosch Connected Biking veut favoriser la gestion des loueurs, assureurs ou entreprises spécialisées dans le vélo électrique.

item.title: Acer Swift Edge 14 AI laptop review: Another lightweight wonder from the Acer stable
item.description: The Acer Swift Edge 14 AI is a lightweight laptop that leverages a 200-series Core Ultra processor and LPDDR5X memory.

item.title: Crunchyroll confirms data breach after hacker claims unauthorized access
item.description: Crunchyroll said it continues to investigate the data breach involving its users' personal information.

item.title: iOS 26.4 est enfin là, voici les principales nouveautés à retenir
item.description: Apple vient de publier la version finale d’iOS 26.4. La nouvelle mise à jour de l’iPhone est arrivée chez tout le monde, avec quelques nouveautés intéressantes.

item.title: Doss raises $55M for AI inventory management that plugs into ERP
item.description: Doss's AI-powered inventory management system integrates with existing ERP systems. The Series B round was co-led by Madrona and Premji Invest.

item.title: The Apple Watch SE 3 is even easier to recommend at $50 off
item.description: When Apple released the latest Apple Watch SE, it surprised us, outshining Apple’s more expensive models while improving on the basics. Now that it’s on sale, it’s even easier to recommend. The LTE-enabled model has dropped back to its all-time low of $249 ($50 off) at Amazon for the first time since December, while the […]

item.title: Stick vacuums on sale ahead of Amazons spring sale: Shark is dunking on Dyson right now
item.description: Ahead of Amazon's Big Spring Sale, get the most powerful Shark vacuum for under $400 or get a self-emptying stick vacuum under $250.

item.title: iOS 26.4 is here, with Playlist Playground and new emoji
item.description: iOS and iPadOS 26.4 are here, with a surprising number of new features for a point release. Chief among them is a new AI playlist generator, similar to one Spotify launched in 2024.Playlist Playground is Apple's branding for the song list generator. It works as you'd expect: Type a prompt, and it spits out tracks that match it. As MacRumors noted, your prompts can relate to mood, feelings, activities and more.Also new in iOS 26.4, an ambient music widget puts background sounds on your home screen. Like the corresponding Control Center tool, it brings up (Apple-curated) sounds for sleep, chill,...

item.title: ChatGPT and Gemini are fighting to be the AI bot that sells you stuff
item.description: The AI-powered shopping rivalry is heating up as Google and OpenAI launch new features to help you buy things while interacting with their chatbots. Now, Google is teaming up with Gap Inc to allow its Gemini AI assistant to purchase clothes on your behalf from any of its stores, which include Gap, Old Navy, Banana […]

item.title: Epic Games is laying off more than 1,000 employees just weeks after raising Fortnite V-Buck prices 'to help pay the bills'
item.description: Epic Games is laying off more than 1,000 employees.
